creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Comment on attachment 163748
Proposed patch (since 385394 revision)

I think, there is no need to define ALLOW_PRECOMPILED_HEADERS for CLANG.bm file, because it is "0" by default. But, this is a difference between CLANG.bm.in and GCC.bm.in files, which provided with source files, therefore I included this change.

Also, it is possible to change DEBUG_INFO to "2" (full debug info level instead of none), but in my tests (with using CLANG builder) the gdb debugger crashes with core dump. May be, there is a reason why it is "0" still.
